title: Imperial 676th Light Support Scouts
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial 676th Light Support Scouts''' was a unit in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. It seemed to serve no function except to house murderers, thieves, cowards, and the less intelligent until their term of service ended.

The unit had the reputation of being "the first to arrive, and the first to die."

[[Lex Kempo|Lex "Mad Vornskr" Kempo]] was a member of this unit when he deserted the Imperial Army to join the [[Red Moons]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
